name: Mi Agrupacion Plus

releases.author: jaliriogbarrios19
releases.description:
## v1.4.0 — 2026-07-12

### Features
- Toggle "Primera visita del ciclo" en formulario de visitas para conteo exacto de hogares
- Nuevo view "Balance por período" con agrupación semanal, quincenal, mensual y personalizado

### Fixes
- Las vistas ahora se refrescan automáticamente después de cada sincronización
- Fix: h3 reemplazado por setHeading() para compliance con review bot

### Improvements
- ~Hogares visitados usa flag explícito como prioridad, Union-Find como fallback para datos legacy
releases.name: v1.4.0

releases.author: jaliriogbarrios19
releases.description:
Eliminated last 2 remaining ESLint warnings in date.ts by replacing .toString() / .padStart() with pure arithmetic operators and template literals.


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/jaliriogbarrios19/mi-agrupacion-plus/compare/1.3.4...1.3.5
releases.name: v1.3.5 — ESLint Zero Warnings

releases.author: jaliriogbarrios19
releases.description:
## ESLint — All no-unsafe-* warnings eliminated

### Root cause
The ESLint parser cannot resolve generic return types of Array prototype methods (flatMap, filter, reduce, map, some) and built-in constructors (String, Object.entries).

### Fix
- Replaced all Array method calls with explicit for-loops across 8 files
- Replaced Object.entries() with Object.keys() + direct access
- Replaced String() with .toString()
- Added void prefix to async fire-and-forget calls

### Previous Changes (v1.3.0-v1.3.3)
- Admin record delete with confirmation
- Proactive token refresh timer
- Proactive token validation
- api() error handling improvements
- ScanResult explicit type annotations (50+ callbacks)
- activeDocument, execCommand, noImplicitAny, etc.


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/jaliriogbarrios19/mi-agrupacion-plus/compare/1.3.3...1.3.4
releases.name: v1.3.4 — ESLint Clean

releases.author: jaliriogbarrios19
releases.description:
## ESLint — no-unsafe-* warnings eliminated

- Split all inline flatMap/filter/reduce chains into typed intermediate variables across 8 files
- Eliminates remaining no-unsafe-call and no-unsafe-argument warnings
- ESLint cannot resolve Array.prototype method return types — intermediate variables with explicit types are required

## Previous Changes

### v1.3.2 — Explicit type annotations
- Added ScanResult type annotations to 50+ callbacks
- Cast Record to local interfaces in share.ts
- activeDocument, promise void, String().padStart() fixes

### v1.3.0 / v1.3.1
- Admin record delete with confirmation
- Proactive token refresh timer (45 min)
- Proactive token validation on startup
- api() error handling improvements
- Obsidian review compliance fixes


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/jaliriogbarrios19/mi-agrupacion-plus/compare/1.3.2...1.3.3
releases.name: v1.3.3 — ESLint Clean

releases.author: jaliriogbarrios19
releases.description:
## ESLint Compliance

- Added explicit ScanResult type annotations to all .data access callbacks across 8 files
- Cast Record<string,unknown> to local interfaces in share.ts
- Used intermediate variables for String().padStart() in date.ts
- Reverted to activeDocument in chart-utils
- Added void prefix to async startSync() calls in main.ts

## Previous Changes (1.3.0/1.3.1)

### New Features
- Admin record delete with confirmation dialog
- Proactive token refresh timer (every 45 minutes)

### Bug Fixes
- Proactive token validation on startup
- api() no longer throws for HTTP errors
- syncNow() validates token before syncing
- Object.entries() any leak fixed
- noImplicitAny enabled in tsconfig.json
- Removed deprecated document.execCommand('copy')


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/jaliriogbarrios19/mi-agrupacion-plus/compare/1.3.1...1.3.2

releases.name: v1.3.1 -- Review Compliance

releases.author: jaliriogbarrios19
releases.description:
## New Features

### Admin Record Delete
- **Delete any record** from the detail view in RecordListModal
- Confirmation dialog before deletion
- Automatically cleans up associated photos
- Supabase sync auto-propagates deletions to remote

## Bug Fixes

### Sync/Authentication
- **Proactive token validation** on startup — detects expired sessions immediately instead of failing silently
- **api() no longer throws** for HTTP error responses — returns {status, json} for all responses, enabling proper error logging
- **Response body logged on 400** — helps debug Supabase REST API rejections
- **syncNow() method** validates token + approval before starting sync, preventing cascading failures
- **Sync button** now uses plugin.syncNow() instead of manual stop+start+push sequence
- **Retry preserves extraHeaders** — token refresh retry no longer drops Prefer headers

### Obsidian Plugin Review Compliance
- Fixed document -> ctiveDocument for popout window compatibility
- Removed unnecessary type assertion in chart-utils.ts
- Removed 10 unused imports in dashboard-view.ts
- Fixed Object.entries() returning ny — added explicit [string, T][] casts
- Fixed ScanResult imports to resolve directly from manager-scan (ESLint parser)
- Enabled 
oImplicitAny in tsconfig.json

## Files Changed
- src/modals/record-list-modal.ts — delete button with confirmation
- src/main.ts — proactive token validation, syncNow() method
- src/supabase/client.ts — api() error handling, Object.entries cast
- src/data/parser.ts — Object.entries cast
- src/settings/admin.ts, src/settings/auxiliar.ts — sync button uses syncNow()
- src/views/chart-utils.ts — activeDocument, removed assertion
- src/views/dashboard-kpis.ts — passes DataManager to RecordListModal
- src/views/general-view.ts — passes DataManager + onDeleted to RecordListModal
- Multiple files — ScanResult import path fixes, ESLint compliance
releases.name: v1.3.0 — Admin Delete + Sync Fixes

releases.author: jaliriogbarrios19
releases.description:
## Chart System Rewrite

### New Features
- **Interactive charts** powered by Chart.js — tooltips, legends, animations
- **Bar charts** (actual vs meta) for all 4 metric groups
- **Doughnut charts** — visit condition distribution, activity type distribution
- **Trend line charts** — monthly visits, monthly F19 within cycle
- **Theme-aware colors** from Obsidian CSS variables (respects light/dark themes)

### Architecture
- Centralized chart data computation in \chart-data.ts\ — eliminates code duplication across dashboard, general, resumen-srp, and campaña views
- \enderAllCharts()\ helper — single call renders all chart types
- Extracted \ uildCampanaBars()\ and \groupByMonth()\ helpers

### Bug Fixes
- Fixed Chart.js memory leaks — proper cleanup lifecycle in all views (re-render and close)
- Fixed Obsidian plugin review compliance: \h4\ → \Setting.setHeading()\
- Fixed tooltip percentage showing incorrectly on Meta dataset
- Added empty data guards — empty bar groups no longer render
- Added console.warn for invalid dates in trend computation

### Files Changed
- \src/views/chart-utils.ts\ — Chart.js renderer (bar, doughnut, trend, toggle, cleanup)
- \src/views/chart-data.ts\ — unified chart data computation
- All 4 views updated to use unified system
releases.name: v1.2.0 — Chart.js
